zh.lifeSummary: Dafydd ap Hywel是Robert ap Hywel和Jonet ferch Gruffudd的兒子，於大約1305年出生在英國威爾斯丹比爾。他於大約1323年與Mrs. Dafydd ap Hywel在英國威爾斯尼德代福瑞結婚。他們至少是4個兒子的父母。他去世於1365年在威爾士享年61歲。

nameMeanings.name: Hywel
meanings: A Welsh name. Some write the name Hoel, which they render 'lordly;' if so, it may come from huail, a vice-regent, regent. Arthur derives the surname Howell from Corn. -Brit, houl, the sun; and he adds, high, exalted.' But Hywel is rather from hywel, conspicuous.

nameMeanings.name: Dafydd
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: equivalent of David . In widespread use during the Middle Ages, it was later largely replaced by the English form, but since the late 19th century it has come into its own again.

nameMeanings.name: ap
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Short form of any of the names beginning with this syllable.

variants.name: Alexander
meanings: From the Latin form of the Greek name Alexandros, from alexein ‘to defend’ + anēr ‘man, warrior’ (genitive andros). The name became extremely popular in the post-classical period, and was borne by several individuals in the New Testament and some early Christian saints. Its use as a common given name throughout Europe, however, derives largely from the fame of Alexander the Great , King of Macedon ( 356–323 bc ), around whom a large body of popular legend grew up in late antiquity, much of which came to be embodied in the medieval ‘Alexander romances’.

variants.name: Alan
meanings: Of Celtic origin and uncertain derivation (possibly a diminutive of a word meaning ‘rock’). It was introduced into England by Breton followers of William the Conqueror , most notably Alan , Earl of Brittany, who was rewarded for his services with vast estates in the newly conquered kingdom. In Britain the variants Allan and Allen are considerably less frequent, and generally represent transferred uses of surname forms, whereas in America all three forms of the name are approximately equally common. See also Alun .

variants.name: Albert
meanings: From an Old French name, Albert, of Germanic (Frankish) origin, derived from adal ‘noble’ + berht ‘bright, famous’. This was adopted by the Normans and introduced by them to England, displacing the Old English form Æþelbeorht. The name is popular in a variety of forms in Western Europe, and has been traditional in a number of European princely families. It was out of favour in England for centuries, however, and the revival of its popularity in the 19th century was largely in honour of Queen Victoria's consort, Prince Albert of Saxe-Coburg-Gotha .

en.lifeSummary: Dafydd ap Hywel was born about 1305, in Denbighshire, Wales, United Kingdom as the son of Robert ap Hywel and Jonet ferch Gruffudd. He married Mrs. Dafydd ap Hywel about 1323, in Dyffryn, Gwynedd, Wales, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 4 sons. He died in 1365, in Wales, at the age of 61.

Il a épousé Mrs. Dafydd ap Hywel environ 1323, à Dyffryn, Gwynedd, Pays de Galles, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils. Il est décédé en 1365, à Galles, à l’âge de 61 ans.

ja.lifeSummary: Dafydd ap Hywelは約1305年にイギリスウェールズデンビグhシュアイアでRobert ap HywelとJonet ferch Gruffuddの息子として生まれた。約1323年にイギリスウェールズグウイネッドディフリンでMrs. Dafydd ap Hywelと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子の親であった。彼は1365年にウェールズで61歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Dafydd ap Hywel(은)는 대략 1305년 영국 웨일스 덴비그h실르에서 Robert ap Hywel(와)과 Jonet ferch Gruffudd의 아들로 태어났다. 그는 대략 1323년 영국 웨일스 그w이네드 디프린에서 Mrs. Dafydd ap Hywel(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1365년 웨일스에서 61세의 나이로 사망했다.

ru.lifeSummary: Dafydd ap Hywel родился около 1305 г. в местности денбаишир, Уэльс, Великобритания. Его родителей звали Robert ap Hywel и Jonet ferch Gruffudd. Он женился на женщине по имени Mrs. Dafydd ap Hywel около 1323 г. в местности диффрин, гвинедд, Уэльс, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына. Он умер в 1365 г. в местности Уэльс в возрасте 61 год.
